The move positions Martı among a growing list of global companies incorporating digital assets into their treasury management strategies. Japan's Panasonic announces a new chief at its group company as its profits barely hold up Japanese electronics and technology company Panasonic has chosen a new chief executive at a group company after eking out a 1.2% rise in its first-quarter profit.  Kenneth William Sain, a former Boeing executive, will replace Yasuyuki Higuchi as Panasonic Connect's president and chief executive in April 2026, the company said Wednesday.  Panasonic Connect offers solutions and products for various supply chains, public services, infrastructure and entertainment sectors.
